bosses.name: Lucky Djinn (galactic)
bosses.note: '<Spectre> The Lucky Djinn has been defeated'.

mechanics: MAJOR D2 recovery: the AUCTION HOUSE UI (BUY/SELL tabs, prices in Fame, 'Total auctions placed: 2583', player fame balance shown) — its 'Quick Select' sidebar lists the real tradeable item/currency types: **NODESTONES** -> 'Small Nodestone', 'Big Nodestone', 'Starforce Small Nodestone', 'Starforce Big Nodestone' (these are the D2 'Runes + Nodestones' material/currency, in 2 sizes x normal/Starforce tiers). Also: Special Crate, Char Slot Unlocker, Vault Chest Unlocker, Backpack, Potion of Life, Potion of Mana. Auction listings show armor/weapons/rings/abilities at fame prices (e.g. 25000/6949/500000/83500) with auction-duration timers (33h/46h/47h) + Buy buttons. Galactic farming (Lucky Djinn, Uvuvwevwevwe). New announcer persona: Spectre.
uncertain: Exact Nodestone function (how they're consumed into runes/skill-tree nodes) not shown here — but their existence + 4 tiers (Small/Big x normal/Starforce) is DOCUMENTED. Auction item names not all legible.
confidence: HIGH for the Auction House catalog + NODESTONE item tiers (DOCUMENTED — directly feeds D2); MEDIUM for biomes; galactic bosses documented.
